stemHtml: A pilot is asked by ATC to descend to FL120 at a point 50 NM away. He/she realizes he/she won’t make it. What should the pilot do?

options.a: Descend at MMO until changeover altitude, switch to IAS as long as you don’t exceed VMO. Use speed brakes if needed.
options.b: Descend at M<sub>MO</sub> all the way down to FL120. Use speed brakes if needed.
options.c: Descend at V<sub>MO</sub> all the way to FL120 without speed brakes.
